features: Save money: travel abroad with your child car seat on the aeroplane, saving money on holiday car rentals and ensuring your child is safe and comfortable in their own car seat during your holiday
Protect your car seat: protects your child's car seat from dirt and scratches during travel with our water-resistant, non-rip high grade ballistic nylon and reinforced stitching

Secure bag design: secure closure with drawstrings and large clipped hood, padded base for extra protection, rear carry handle and comfortable long neoprene shoulder pads to wear like a backpack and free up both hands at the airport

Universal size: fits all car seats from new born and up, including Britax, Maxi-Cosi, Graco, Recaro, Cybex and many others; dimensions are 45 x 45 x 84 centimetres and folds up into a small carry pouch for easy storage
Airplane travel: ideal for airplane travel to transport your child’s car seat when holidaying abroad; check your car seat bag in at check-in or gate check at the airport
description: Product Description Large Hood with Clip Closure The Huckaboo Car Seat bag has a large hood and clip closure, providing you with a bigger more secure cover for your car seat and prevents items from falling out. Long Neoprene Shoulder Pads The long, soft neoprene shoulder pads are designed for extra comfort, allowing you to wear like a backpack and free up both hands at the airport. Premium Quality 600D Ballistic Nylon Made from a high quality, ultra strong nylon to prevent rips and protect your car seat as it travels through the airport baggage system. Easily fold your car seat travel bag away into the handy carry pouch bag Step 1 Lay the car seat bag flat on its front and make 2 folds into the centre from the side of the bag Step 2 Make 3 folds from the bottom of the bag to the top Step 3 Once folded to top, flip over and neatly push the folded car seat bag into the attached carry pouch Step 4 Zip up the carry pouch and store your car seat travel bag neatly away until your next holiday The Huckaboo Car Seat Travel Bag Huckaboo is a family brand with a mission to produce quality-made, premium products designed to make your life easier when travelling with children. The Huckaboo car seat travel bag is the ideal way to transport your child's car seat when you travel by airplane on your holidays. Save money on costly car rentals and check-in or gate check your child's own car seat at the airport, safe in the knowledge they'll be sitting in the same quality car seat you can trust. [UNIVERSAL] The Huckaboo bag is a universal fit travel bag. Designed to carry all types of seat from Group 0 newborn/infant car seats, right through to Group 3 high back boosters. [STRONG] Protect your seat from dirt, scratches and scuffs as it goes through the baggage system at the airport. We've designed the car seat storage bag with strong, re-enforced stitching and used a tough ballistic nylon with 600D basket weave to give your seat the best protection during travel. [SAFE] The draw string closure with clipped hood, ensures your seat will remain securely contained in the car seat bag holder as you travel. [ADDED PROTECTION] We have added extra protection by introducing a soft neoprene padded base to absorb impact on the bottom of the car seat. [COMFORTABLE] Long padded shoulder straps allow you to wear it like a backpack and free up both hands to deal with other luggage and children as you walk through the airport. [EASY TO SPOT] Available in navy with striking orange detailing makes the bag easy to spot as it comes down the luggage conveyor belt. And when you're finished with the bag, simply fold it up into the attached carry pouch for easy storage.
